zh.lifeSummary: 當Philip de Bamville Lord of Stourton於1230年出生在英國爾斯托雷頓時，他的父親Sir Thomas Bamville21歲，母親Agnes de Stourton27歲。他於1257年與Nichola de Pulford在英國爾斯托雷頓結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1284年2月4日在他的家鄉享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philip de Bamville Lord of Stourton于1230年出生在英国爾斯托雷頓时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Bamville21岁，母亲Agnes de Stourton27岁。他于1257年与Nichola de Pulford在英国爾斯托雷頓结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世于1284年2月4日在他的家乡享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bamville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Alban, Andre, Armand, Benoit.
French and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Banville in Calvados, France, recorded in the 13th century as Badanvilla ‘estate of a woman called Bada’. Compare Banfield .

variants.name: Banfield
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Banville in Calvados, Normandy, France. There has been some confusion between this surname and   Bonfield  . In Ireland this is a variant of   Banville  , the original French form of the placename, and now the usual spelling of the surname in Ireland; it is associated primarily with County Wexford.

English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places in England with similar names, such as Bampfylde House in Poltimore, Devon and Bamville Farm in Wheathampstead, Hertfordshire. There may have been some confusion with   Benfield  .

variants.name: Banwell
meanings: English (Somerset): habitational name from Banwell in Somerset, named from Old English bana ‘killer’ + wella ‘stream, spring’.
English: habitational name from Banwell Farm in North Mundham, Sussex.
Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Banville   or   Banfield  .

nameMeanings.name: Philip
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Philip de Bamville Lord of Stourton was born in 1230, in Storeton, Cheshire, England, his father, Sir Thomas Bamville, was 21 and his mother, Agnes de Stourton, was 27. He married Nichola de Pulford in 1257, in Storeton, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died on 4 February 1284, in his hometown, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philip de Bamville Lord of Stourton est né en 1230, à Storeton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Bamville, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Stourton, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Nichola de Pulford en 1257, à Storeton, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé le 4 février 1284, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Philip de Bamville Lord of Stourton 1230 in Storeton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Bamville 21 und seine Mutter Agnes de Stourton 27. Er hat 1257 in Storeton, Cheshire, England Nichola de Pulford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb am 4. Februar 1284 im Alter von 54 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Philip de Bamville Lord of Stourton è nato il nel 1230 nel Storeton, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Bamville, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Stourton, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Nichola de Pulford nel 1257, nel Storeton, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì il 4 febbraio 1284, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Philip de Bamville Lord of Stourtonが1230年にイギリスチェシュアイアストーレトンで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Bamvilleは21歳，母Agnes de Stourtonは27歳であった。1257年にイギリスチェシュアイアストーレトンでNichola de Pulfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1284年2月4日に故郷で54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Philip de Bamville Lord of Stourton(이)가 1230년 영국 체실르 스토레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Bamville(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Stourton(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1257년 영국 체실르 스토레턴에서 Nichola de Pulford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1284년 2월 4일 그의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philip de Bamville Lord of Stourton nasceu em 1230, em Storeton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Bamville, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Stourton, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Nichola de Pulford em 1257, em Storeton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de fevereiro de 1284, em sua cidade natal, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philip de Bamville Lord of Stourton родился в 1230 г. в местности сторетон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Bamville было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Stourton, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Nichola de Pulford в 1257 г. в местности сторетон, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер 4 февраля 1284 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Philip de Bamville Lord of Stourton nació en 1230, en Storeton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Bamville, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Agnes de Stourton, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Nichola de Pulford en 1257, en Storeton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió el 4 de febrero de 1284, en su pueblo, a la edad de 54 años.
